use_cases: Display user profile pictures in applications and dashboards
Show placeholder fallback when avatar images fail to load
Display user avatars in comment sections and review systems
Render author or reviewer avatars in content management interfaces
Show user avatars in notification panels and activity feeds
ai_summary: A Radix UI-based avatar component with image and fallback support, built with Tailwind CSS. Part of the Cult UI design system, it provides a rounded user profile picture display with automatic fallback to initials when the image fails to load. Suitable for any application requiring user representation.
